name: ICARES Medicus, Inc.
summary: ICARES Medicus, Inc. engages in the research and development, manufacture, and sale of ophthalmic medical materials. The company provides nanomedical lubricious coatings and various surface treatments for implantable or interventional medical devices; intraocular lenses for the treatment of cataracts, myopia, hyperopia, presbyopia, or astigmatism; and nanomedical devices. It has operations in the United States, England, Japan, Taiwan, Spain, Hungary, China, and internationally. The company was founded in 2011 and is based in Zhubei, Taiwan.
